scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix client
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage --prefix client && npm run ci:backend && npm run build:client
scripts.ci:backend: npm run ci:backend:test && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.ci:backend:test: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run test:all:coverage
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:client
